properties.description: Main Route 1A — enters via Main Rd / Dreyersdal Rd (J1), travels Dreyersdal Farm Rd to Starke Rd south (J3), south along Starke Rd through Children's Way (J27) and Airlie Rd (J22), then Christopher Rd (J4→J5) and Vineyard Rd to school ingress at Leyden/Ruskin (J6→J7).
Rat-run 1A-RR1 — from J1 continues south on Dreyersdal Rd direct to Airlie Rd (J15), then Dreyersdal/Christopher east (J18), follows main corridor J4→J5→J6→J7; avoids Farm Rd and residential streets.
Rat-run 1A-RR2 — follows 1A to Starke/Airlie (J22), then cuts east on Airlie to Vineyard east (J19), west on Vineyard via Dante/Vineyard (J16) to Christopher/Vineyard (J5→J6→J7).
Rat-run 1A-RR3 — as 1A-RR2 to Dante/Vineyard (J16), then north on Dante Rd to Ruskin (J17) and directly into school ingress J7; bypasses J5/J6.
Rat-run 1A-RR4 — after J19 turns south on Airlie to Tussendal/Airlie (J23), then to Airlie/Dante south (J14), north on Dante to Ruskin (J17) and J7.
Rat-run 1A-RR5 — branches at J3 south onto Tussendal Ave via Farm Rd/Tussendal (J21), through Tussendal/Airlie (J23), Airlie south/Dante south (J14), north on Dante to Ruskin (J17) and J7.
Rat-run 1A-RR6 — as 1A-RR5 to Tussendal/Airlie (J23), then east to Vineyard east/Airlie (J19), west on Vineyard via Dante/Vineyard (J16) to J5→J6→J7.
Main Route 2A — enters from Ladies Mile at Homestead Ave (J9, TIA Int.2), west along Homestead Ave to Dreyersdal Rd (J28), south on Dreyersdal to Christopher Rd east (J18), then J4→J5→J6→J7.
Rat-run 2A-RR1 — from J28 continues south on Dreyersdal to Homestead/Starke (J10), south on Starke to Clement Rd (J24), west on Clement to Leyden (J25), then J6→J7; bypasses congested J4/J5 funnel.
Rat-run 2A-RR2 — from J10 south on Starke Rd past Clement Rd (J24) to Christopher Rd (J4), then standard J4→J5→J6→J7.

properties.entry_road: Children's Way (from Ladies Mile M39 signal)
properties.description: Main Route 2B — enters at Ladies Mile / Children's Way signal (J8, TIA Int.3), west along Children's Way to Dreyersdal Rd (J26), south on Dreyersdal to Airlie Rd (J15), continues to J18→J4→J5→J6→J7.

properties.entry_road: Children's Way (from Ladies Mile M39 signal)
properties.description: Rat-run 2B-RR1 — from J26 south on Children's Way to Starke Rd (J27), south on Starke via Airlie (J22) to J4→J5→J6→J7.

properties.entry_road: Children's Way (from Ladies Mile M39 signal)
properties.description: Rat-run 2B-RR2 — from J22 cuts east on Airlie to Vineyard east (J19), west on Vineyard via Dante/Vineyard (J16) to J5→J6→J7.

properties.entry_road: Children's Way (from Ladies Mile M39 signal)
properties.description: Rat-run 2B-RR3 — as 2B-RR2 to Dante/Vineyard (J16), then north on Dante to Ruskin (J17), directly into school ingress J7.

properties.entry_road: Firgrove Way (from Dreyersdal Rd / M39 south)
properties.description: Main Route 3A — enters at Firgrove Way / Dreyersdal Rd (J13, TIA Int.1), east along Dreyersdal Rd to Homestead Ave (J28), then as route 2A: south on Dreyersdal to J18→J4→J5→J6→J7.

properties.entry_road: Firgrove Way (from Dreyersdal Rd / M39 south)
properties.description: Rat-run 3A-RR1 — from J28 south on Dreyersdal to Homestead/Starke (J10), south on Starke to Clement Rd (J24), west on Clement to Leyden (J25), J6→J7; mirrors 2A-RR1.

properties.entry_road: Firgrove Way (from Dreyersdal Rd / M39 south)
properties.description: Rat-run 3A-RR2 — from J13 north on Starke Rd to Firgrove/Starke north (J12), east to Homestead/Starke (J10), then south to Clement Rd (J24), west on Clement to Leyden (J25), J6→J7; avoids Dreyersdal Rd entirely.
